failed_attempts.sql:
WITH query AS (
  SELECT to_tsquery('english', 'sócio | torcedor | membership | sócio-torcedor') AS q
)
SELECT 
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  pub.description
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id,
query
WHERE p.username = 'fluminensefc'
  AND pub.description_lexemes @@ query.q
ORDER BY ts_rank(pub.description_lexemes, query.q) DESC
LIMIT 10;
